title: Book City
initial: Book-City is a modern bookstore frontend project where users can explore, search, and view books through an interactive and user-friendly interface using mock data.
description: Book-City is a responsive bookstore UI project built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS. Users can browse book collections, search books, and view detailed book information through a smooth and modern interface. The project focuses on reusable components, clean UI design, responsive layouts, and efficient state management using mock data without backend integration.
overview: Users can explore and search books
Dynamic book listing and detail pages
Built using mock data without backend integration

title: Dragoon News
initial: Dragon News is a full-stack news portal where users can browse, publish, and manage news articles with authentication and role-based access.
description: Dragon News is a full-stack content management news platform that allows users to browse, publish, and manage news articles in an organized and efficient way. It includes authentication and role-based access control, enabling different user permissions for reading and publishing content. The platform is designed with a clean and responsive UI for a smooth reading experience across all devices. Users can explore categorized news and stay updated with the latest posts. The system is built to demonstrate real-world CRUD operations and scalable news management features.

title: Issue Tracker
initial: An Issue Tracker App is a collaborative project management tool that helps developers report, track, and resolve bugs or tasks efficiently with organized workflows.
description: Issue Tracker is a collaborative task management system designed to help developers efficiently report, track, and resolve bugs or tasks within a project. It provides an organized workflow where issues can be created, assigned, updated, and monitored in real time. The platform improves team productivity by keeping all tasks structured and visible in one place. It features a clean and responsive interface for smooth usability across devices. This project demonstrates practical implementation of CRUD operations and real-world project management concepts.
overview: Bug tracking and task management system
Simple and fast UI for productivity

title: Keen-Keeper
initial: Keen-Keeper is a social platform designed to help friends stay connected and maintain meaningful relationships.
description: Keen-Keeper is a social connection platform designed to help friends stay in touch and build stronger relationships over time. It allows users to connect with their friends, share updates, and maintain meaningful interactions in a simple and organized way. The platform focuses on enhancing personal relationships through consistent engagement and communication. With a clean and user-friendly interface, it makes staying connected effortless and enjoyable.
overview: Helps users stay connected with friends

title: Expense Tracker
initial: An Expense Tracker is a simple financial management app that helps users record, monitor, and analyze their daily income and expenses efficiently.
description: An Expense Tracker is a financial management application designed to help users easily record, monitor, and control their daily income and expenses. It provides a clear overview of spending habits, allowing users to understand where their money goes. The app helps improve budgeting by categorizing transactions and tracking overall financial activity. With a simple and intuitive interface, it makes personal finance management easy and accessible.
overview: Track daily income and expenses in an organized way
Sort transactions by date, category, or amount
Helps users analyze spending habits clearly
Supports better budgeting and financial planning
Simple and intuitive interface for easy use
